name: ProPhase Labs, Inc.
business: ProPhase Labs is a next-generation biotech, genomics, and consumer products company that develops and commercializes novel drugs, dietary supplements, and compounds, and offers human genomic testing. It sells whole genome sequencing services through its Nebula Genomics and DNA Complete subsidiaries, dietary supplements under the TK Supplements brand, and is developing the BE-Smart esophageal pre-cancer diagnostic test and therapeutic candidates like Equivir and Linebacker. The company also previously provided COVID-19 diagnostic testing, but that business ceased and its diagnostic subsidiaries filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.
sellsTo: food, drug and mass retail stores

exposures.sentence: Our wholly owned subsidiary, ProPhase BioPharma, Inc. (PBIO) is focused on the licensing, development and commercialization of novel drugs, dietary supplements, and compounds.
We own the exclusive rights to the BE-Smart Esophageal Pre-Cancer diagnostics screening test and related intellectual property assets.
We offer whole genome sequencing and related services through our wholly-owned subsidiary, Nebula Genomics, Inc. and DNA Complete, Inc.
DNA Complete focuses on genomics testing technologies, a comprehensive method for analyzing entire genomes, including the genes and chromosomes in deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA).
Our TK Supplements product line is dedicated to supporting better health, energy and sexual vitality.

catalysts.event: Commercialization of BE-Smart as an LDT and RUO product
catalysts.sentence: Based on these results, we are continuing commercialization of BE-Smart as a LDT and Research Use Only (RUO) product, with steps towards commercialization planned for the first quarter of 2026 and broader insurance-backed commercialization targeted for the third quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Review of finalized Equivir trial results and statistics
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects to review finalized results and statistics in late 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The total potential addressable market for the BE-Smart test is $7 billion to $14 billion per year.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that the reimbursement rate for the test will range between $1,000 to $2,000 per test, giving it a total potential addressable market of $7 billion to $14 billion dollars per year.
